_comment: User-level preferences. Copy to preferences.json and fill in. This file is ALWAYS gitignored — it never leaves your machine. See docs/context-layers.md.

reporting._comment: How agents format their reports and summaries for you.

development._comment: Personal development preferences. Override project/org defaults.

project_paths._comment: Local paths to project repos on this machine. Keyed by project name (must match directory name under context/project/).
